action.hypothesis: The exact active point `(K=40, EF=12)` has now rejected several alternative sparsity mechanisms, while the strongest same-`(K,EF)` signal remains `lowrank_residual`. A space-first follow-up is more justified than more threshold/routing tweaks: adding residual whitening/preconditioning to the proven low-rank trunk may make the residual easier to sparsify at low K and lower proxy FVU without relying on EF>16.
action.summary: Added a new `whitened_lowrank_residual` family under `sparsify/` by extending the working low-rank residual trunk with normalized residual preconditioning before top-k selection, and registered it in config/dispatch. A local instantiation/import sanity check passed. The next run should be a clean proxy comparison at the exact active low-K lane point `K=40, EF=12` with the unchanged `signum`, `lr=1.6e-3`, `auxk_alpha=0` recipe.
action.self_review: This is a single coherent architecture bet aligned with the operator guide's space-first direction and the local evidence that recent sparsity-mechanism swaps were weak at the exact target point. The main risk is that the preconditioned support space may not translate into better decoded residual quality, but the edit is minimal, same-EF, and directly comparable to the local `lowrank_residual` baseline.
notes_to_memory: Round 96 adds a new `whitened_lowrank_residual` family that keeps the successful low-rank residual trunk but preconditions residuals with centering/RMS normalization plus a learned low-rank correction before top-k support selection.

This is a same-`(K=40, EF=12)` architecture comparison against the local `lowrank_residual` baseline, motivated by repeated weakness from recent alternative sparsity mechanisms at the active low-K point.
Local import/instantiation sanity passed for `whitened_lowrank_residual` before handing control back to the runtime.
next_hypotheses: If `whitened_lowrank_residual` is competitive at `K=40, EF=12`, map the family to `K=32, EF=12` before touching EF so the low-K tradeoff lane stays first-class.

If it is clearly weak under normal runtime, deprioritize more local residual-preconditioning variants and pivot the next new-family probe toward a more structurally different low-K architecture rather than more threshold/routing tweaks.
